additional_hook_variation_pack.purpose: Provide new realistic attention hooks for a Grok image-to-video fashion generation using a base image of a woman wearing clothing. Each hook must create viewer attention using only natural body movement, facial timing, posture, eye contact and subtle interaction with existing clothing.

global_hook_rules.camera_behavior: Stable POV phone recording with very subtle handheld micro-movements only
forbidden: No change to the original outfit
No change to the original face or body

hook_variations.name: Quick glance at outfit then camera
hook_variations.main_effect: Creates attention by making the subject briefly acknowledge the outfit before looking back at the viewer.
movement_details: The subject starts in the same position as the base image.
Her face is neutral and relaxed.
She briefly glances down toward the front area of the outfit for less than one second.
Her eyes then return naturally to the camera.
As her gaze returns, her posture subtly straightens.
A very small soft smile appears for a brief moment, then fades.
The movement must feel like she is casually checking the outfit before showing it.
No dramatic chin movement.
No exaggerated smile.
No forced model expression.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After looking back at the camera, she calmly takes a small step forward and begins the subtle fabric-touch sequence.

hook_variations.name: Subtle shoulder reset
hook_variations.main_effect: Captures attention through a realistic posture adjustment, like a person preparing to show the outfit naturally.
movement_details: The subject starts relaxed, with shoulders slightly natural and not stiff.
She makes a tiny shoulder reset, as if correcting her posture.
The movement is symmetrical but not robotic.
Her chest and upper body rise very subtly with natural breathing.
One hand may move softly toward the waist or side of the body.
Her expression remains neutral and calm.
Her eyes stay near the camera without an intense stare.
The outfit moves slightly with the posture correction.
The fabric physics must remain natural and minimal.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After the posture reset, she shifts her weight gently and continues into the outfit presentation.

hook_variations.name: Half-step forward with brief soft smile
hook_variations.main_effect: Creates a natural approach hook without looking like a runway walk.
movement_details: The subject begins at the original distance from the camera.
She takes one small half-step forward, not a full walk.
The step is slow enough to look natural but not sluggish.
Her arms remain relaxed and move subtly with the body.
As she steps forward, a short soft smile appears.
The smile lasts less than one second.
After the step, her expression returns to neutral.
The movement must feel like a real person getting closer to show the outfit.
No exaggerated posing.
No hip-forward pose.
No runway-style movement.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: Once she finishes the half-step, one hand gently touches the existing upper-front fabric area.

hook_variations.name: Light sleeve or side adjustment
hook_variations.main_effect: Uses a realistic clothing-adjustment gesture to catch attention while preserving the original outfit.
movement_details: The subject lightly adjusts an existing clothing area visible in the source image.
If the outfit has sleeves, she may lightly smooth one sleeve.
If the outfit has no sleeve, she may lightly smooth the side seam or upper-front fabric area.
The hand movement is delicate and brief.
She does not pull the clothing aggressively.
She does not change the shape, size, color or design of the clothing.
Her gaze briefly drops toward the hand, then returns to the camera.
Her face remains calm, with a very subtle expression change.
The fabric reacts naturally with tiny folds and contact shadows.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After the adjustment, her hand relaxes down or moves naturally to the waist before the main body movement.

hook_variations.name: Small side-angle reveal
hook_variations.main_effect: Shows the fit of the outfit with a slight angle change, creating visual interest without a full turn.
movement_details: The subject starts facing the camera.
She subtly rotates her torso a few degrees to one side.
The rotation is small, controlled and casual.
Her head remains mostly toward the camera.
Her hips follow naturally but very subtly.
One hand may rest softly on the waist.
The outfit remains exactly the same as in the base image.
The fabric moves naturally with the torso.
She does not spin.
She does not create a side-profile pose.
She does not exaggerate the silhouette.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: She returns slightly toward the center and begins the main clothing presentation.

hook_variations.name: Natural breath and eye contact
hook_variations.main_effect: Creates a realistic human presence through small breathing motion and calm eye contact.
movement_details: The subject starts still but not frozen.
A subtle natural breathing motion is visible in the shoulders and upper torso.
She makes calm eye contact with the camera.
Her lips remain softly closed.
Her face stays neutral, relaxed and human.
She slightly shifts her weight from one leg to the other.
The movement is minimal but alive.
No smile is required at the beginning.
No dramatic facial expression.
No robotic stillness.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After the brief eye contact, she gently moves one hand toward the outfit and begins the fabric presentation.

hook_variations.name: Hand enters frame naturally
hook_variations.main_effect: Catches attention through a hand movement that enters the viewer's focus without becoming distracting.
movement_details: The subject begins with both hands relaxed.
One hand naturally rises into the visible frame.
The hand moves slowly enough to be realistic, but not too slow.
The fingers are relaxed and anatomically correct.
The hand lightly hovers near the existing clothing area.
It briefly touches the fabric, then relaxes.
The gesture looks like she is about to explain or show the clothing, but without speaking.
Her face remains neutral with a faint, natural expression change.
The hand must not cover too much of the outfit.
The hand must not become the main subject of the video.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After the hand touch, she shifts posture and continues showing the outfit with subtle torso movement.

hook_variations.name: Small backward-then-forward natural motion
hook_variations.main_effect: Creates dynamic attention by using a very small natural distance change without zoom or camera movement.
movement_details: The subject begins at the original position.
She makes a tiny natural lean or half-step backward, as if adjusting her balance.
Immediately after, she takes a small step forward toward the camera.
The movement must be smooth and realistic.
Her body remains balanced.
Her arms react naturally to the movement.
Her facial expression stays relaxed.
A brief soft smile may appear only after she steps forward.
No bouncing motion.
No dance-like movement.
No dramatic entrance.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: Once she returns forward, she gently touches the existing front fabric area and begins the outfit presentation.

hook_variations.name: Soft hair tuck then outfit touch
hook_variations.main_effect: Combines a realistic self-adjustment with a clothing presentation cue.
movement_details: The subject briefly raises one hand toward the side of the head.
She softly tucks or brushes hair backward near the ear or side of the face.
The gesture lasts about one second.
The hand then naturally moves down toward the outfit.
She lightly touches the existing upper-front fabric area.
The transition from hair to fabric must feel casual and unplanned.
Her expression remains neutral at first.
A small natural smile may appear during the clothing touch.
No exaggerated hair flip.
No beauty-commercial pose.
No added earrings, jewelry or accessories.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After touching the fabric, she releases it and continues with subtle body movement and posture variation.

hook_variations.name: Camera-awareness micro reaction
hook_variations.main_effect: Makes the subject feel alive by showing a tiny reaction as if she just noticed the camera recording.
movement_details: The subject starts naturally, not fully posed.
She makes a tiny facial reaction as if becoming aware of the camera.
The reaction is subtle: a small eye focus change, slight cheek movement or very faint smile.
She does not look surprised.
She does not act confused.
She does not overperform.
Her posture becomes slightly more presentable in a natural way.
One hand may settle softly on the waist.
The movement must feel like a real person preparing to show the outfit casually.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After the micro reaction, she takes a small natural step forward and begins the fabric interaction.

hook_variations.name: Outfit silhouette check
hook_variations.main_effect: Creates attention by showing the subject briefly checking the fit and silhouette of the outfit.
movement_details: The subject gently looks down toward the outfit.
She subtly smooths the side or front area of the existing clothing.
The gesture is very light and realistic.
She slightly adjusts her stance to show the outfit fit.
One foot may shift a few centimeters forward.
Her shoulders stay relaxed.
Her face returns to neutral after the check.
She looks back at the camera naturally.
No pulling fabric tight.
No reshaping the outfit.
No adding or changing any clothing details.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After the silhouette check, she steps back slightly and rotates her torso a few degrees to continue showing the clothing.

hook_variations.name: Soft turn with neutral face
hook_variations.main_effect: Uses controlled body movement to create visual interest without relying on smiles or exaggerated gestures.
movement_details: The subject begins facing the camera.
She softly turns her upper body slightly to one side.
Her head follows the movement very subtly.
Her face remains neutral and relaxed.
Her arms stay natural and close to the body.
The outfit moves slightly with the torso.
She pauses briefly for a fraction of a second, not frozen.
She then returns toward the camera angle.
No full-body spin.
No dramatic model look.
No seductive pose.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: After returning toward the camera, she begins the main fabric-touch and outfit presentation sequence.
